_comment: Consumed by bin/jonny-bench.mjs. $RUN_HOME=temp home, $WORKDIR=temp project dir, $RUN_DIR=results dir, $MODEL_ARG from models.json, $EFFORT=reasoning effort from models.json or null, $PROMPT=bench body, $SESSION_ID=uuid, $USER=real user. If an argv element references $EFFORT and the model has no effort, that element and its preceding flag element are omitted. credsFiles are copied from the real ~ into $RUN_HOME (0600). authExec writes stdout to writeTo (0600). seedFiles copies selected JSON keys plus extras (0600). env REPLACES the environment (runner adds PATH/TERM/LANG/LC_ALL allowlist only).

claude-code.usage: cli-output.jsonl stdout result event: total_cost_usd + all tokens processed = input_tokens + cache_read_input_tokens + cache_creation_input_tokens + output_tokens

codex.usage: cli-output.jsonl wrappers: stdout text contains JSONL; last type=turn.completed usage.{input_tokens,output_tokens}, or rollout transcript token_count total_token_usage.total_tokens fallback; input_tokens already includes cached tokens. no USD field (ChatGPT plan, unmetered). reasoning effort is pinned with model_reasoning_effort=$EFFORT; reasoning summaries enabled via model_reasoning_summary=detailed.

grok.usage: No stable total-usage event was verified from the Grok streaming-json probe in this environment; extraction records totalTokens and totalCostUsd as null until a real output shape is proven. reasoning effort is pinned with --reasoning-effort $EFFORT.

gemini.usage: No reasoning-effort knob and no stable total-usage event was verified from Gemini stream-json in this environment; extraction records totalTokens and totalCostUsd as null and cli-output.jsonl remains the transcript fallback.
